encryption.description: Defines encryption settings, including identity and key vault details

identity.description: Configures the managed identity, including IDs and tenant information

local_auth_enabled.description: Indicates if local authentication is enabled (true/false)

name.description: Specifies the resource name (must be unique and required)

public_network_access.description: Defines access level for public networks (e.g., Enabled, Disabled)

purge_protection_enabled.description: Indicates if purge protection is enabled (true/false)

replica.description: Specifies replica settings, including location and endpoint details

sku.description: Specifies the SKU tier (e.g., Standard, Premium)

soft_delete_retention_days.description: Defines retention days for soft-deleted items (must be a number)

tags.description: Defines metadata as key-value pairs for resource categorization

timeouts.description: Configures operation timeouts for create, read, update, and delete

resource_group_name.description: Name of the resource group that this resource will be created in.

location.description: Location that this resource will be created in. (e.g. eastus2, southeastasia)
